title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners List - E! News
text: The 83rd Golden Globes ceremony, hosted by Nikki Glaser on January 11, 2026, celebrated the year's top entertainment achievements. In the television drama actress category, Rhea Seehorn won for her performance in "Pluribus." The ceremony featured major winners across film, television, and podcasts, with the evening marking historic achievements across multiple categories. Notable victors included Timothée Chalamet for Best Male Actor – Motion Picture – Musical/Comedy, Teyana Taylor for Best Supporting Female Actor – Motion Picture, and Wagner Moura for Best Male Actor – Motion Picture – Drama.
